name: Jinxed Love
original_name: รักออกฤทธิ์
overview: Wanisa is a woman who was married to many guys but all of them died suddenly after becoming her husband. Then Joe enters the scene. What will happen when these two meet again and again, will he be her last guy and also last forever?

trailers.title: ตัวอย่างละคร รักออกฤทธิ์ (Teaser1)
